replacementDecision.recommendedActivation: STRUCTURED_V2 is the only in-repo runtime. Continue collecting authorized landmark replay data before making clinical validity claims.

gates.reason: Integrated npm check includes structured state machine, findings, recommendation, agent, and UI checks.
Default replay fixtures produced expected deterministic results.
Structured UI check verifies valid and invalid result screen flow.
Invalid fixture does not produce normal exercise flow in UI checks.
Recommendation validation found no risk cap violation.
Agent validation matched expected policies without unsafe guardrail violations.
pipeline.config.js uses STRUCTURED_V2 as the only in-repo runtime mode; legacy analyzer and adapter files were removed.
No real or explicitly authorized human landmark dataset is present in the repository; this remains a clinical-validation limitation, not a legacy-code rollback gate.
